languages.text: "В былые времена последователям Императора было запрещено брать в руки оружие. Работать менее двадцати сирен. И уж точно биться с кем-то на смерть за кусок хлеба. Все это — грехи, что должно было искупать долгими молитвами. Новый мир, в котором ныне живу Дети Искупления... подходит далеко не каждой душе. Я буду молиться о том, чтобы Император простил бежавших так же, как я прощаю их я".

traits.locale_text: "В былые времена последователям Императора было запрещено брать в руки оружие. Работать менее двадцати сирен. И уж точно биться с кем-то на смерть за кусок хлеба. Я буду молиться о том, чтобы Император простил бежавших так же, как я прощаю их я".

Я буду молиться о том, чтобы Император простил бежавших так же, как я прощаю их я".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."
languages.original_text: "В былые времена последователям Императора было запрещено брать в руки оружие. Работать менее двадцати сирен. И уж точно биться с кем-то на смерть за кусок хлеба. Все это — грехи, что должно было искупать долгими молитвами. Новый мир, в котором ныне живу Дети Искупления... подходит далеко не каждой душе. Я буду молиться о том, чтобы Император простил бежавших так же, как я прощаю их я".

These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. languages.text: "Früher war es den Gefolgsleuten des Kaisers verboten, eine Waffe in die Hand zu nehmen, für weniger als zwanzig Klaxen zu arbeiten und ganz sicher nicht mit den anderen um ein verschimmeltes Brot bis zum Tod zu kämpfen. Diese Verbrechen mussten mit langen Gebeten gesühnt werden. Diese neue Welt, die die Kinder der Erlösung nun bewohnen, ist nicht für jede Seele geeignet. Ich bete, dass der Imperator denen vergibt, die geflohen sind, denn ich habe ihnen schon vor langer Zeit vergeben."
languages.original_text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."

languages.text: "Autrefois, il était interdit aux fidèles de l'empereur de prendre une arme, de travailler pour moins de vingt klaxons et surtout de se battre à mort contre les autres pour une miche de pain moisi. Ces crimes devaient être expiés par de longues prières. Ce nouveau monde que les enfants de la Rédemption habitent maintenant... n'est pas fait pour toutes les âmes. Je prie pour que l'Empereur pardonne à ceux qui ont fui, car je leur ai pardonné il y a longtemps."
languages.original_text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."

languages.text: "在过去，皇帝的追随者被禁止拿起武器，禁止为少于二十响的钟声工作，更禁止为了一块发霉的面包与他人决一死战。这些罪行必须通过长时间的祈祷来弥补。救赎之子现在居住的这个新世界......并不适合每一个灵魂。我祈求皇帝宽恕那些逃亡者 因为我早就宽恕了他们"
languages.original_text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."

languages.text: "Antiguamente, a los seguidores del Emperador se les prohibía coger un arma, trabajar por menos de veinte klaxons y, con toda seguridad, luchar a muerte contra los demás por una hogaza de pan mohoso. Estos crímenes debían expiarse con largas oraciones. Este nuevo mundo que los Hijos de la Redención habitan ahora... no es apto para todas las almas. Rezo para que el Emperador perdone a los que huyeron, pues yo los perdoné hace mucho tiempo".
languages.original_text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."

languages.text: 「その昔、皇帝に仕える者たちは、武器を手にすることも、20クラクション以下で働くことも、カビの生えたパンをめぐって他の者たちと死闘を繰り広げることも禁じられていた。これらの罪は長い祈りをもって償わなければならなかった。贖罪の子供たちが今住んでいるこの新しい世界は、すべての魂に適しているわけではない。皇帝が逃亡した者たちを許してくださるよう祈ります。私はずっと前に彼らを許しましたから。"
languages.original_text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."

languages.text: "Eskiden İmparator'un müritlerinin ellerine silah almaları, yirmi klaksondan az bir ücretle çalışmaları ve kesinlikle bir somun küflü ekmek için diğerleriyle ölümüne dövüşmeleri yasaktı. Bu suçların kefaretinin uzun dualarla ödenmesi gerekiyordu. Kefaretin Çocukları'nın yaşadığı bu yeni dünya... her ruh için uygun değil. İmparatorun kaçanları affetmesi için dua ediyorum, çünkü ben onları uzun zaman önce affettim."
languages.original_text: "Back in the old days the Emperor's followers were forbidden from picking up a weapon, working for less than twenty klaxons, and most certainly from fighting the others to the death over a loaf of mouldy bread. These crimes had to be atoned for with lengthy prayers. This new world that the Children of Redemption now inhabit... is not fit for every soul. I pray that the Emperor forgives those who fled, for I forgave them a long time ago."
